pi_items.source: Task description step 2: 'Create a new Workspace named alpha_corp'; export_result.sh line 8: EXPECTED_WS="alpha_corp"
Task description step 5: 'Publish the ne_rivers table as a layer named secure_rivers'; export_result.sh line 9: EXPECTED_LAYER="secure_rivers"
Task description step 4: 'Create a new PostGIS Store in this workspace named alpha_ds'; export_result.sh line 10: EXPECTED_STORE="alpha_ds"

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, public-domain geospatial data from Natural Earth 1:110m Physical Vectors, specifically the ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines shapefile. Three metadata claims have been verified: (1) the workspace must be named 'alpha_corp' as specified in task step 2 and checked in export_result.sh; (2) the layer must be named 'secure_rivers' (from the ne_rivers table) as specified in task step 5 and checked by export_result.sh; (3) the PostGIS data store must be named 'alpha_ds' as specified in task step 4 and checked by export_result.sh. All three claims are consistent across the task description, setup script, and verification script.
